title: Trump Misstates Facts in State of the Union Regarding Charlotte Murder
summary: Trump incorrectly linked a Charlotte murder to open borders, when the suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the politicization of local crime and potential misinformation spread on a national stage.

title: Swimming Pool Filter Maker Hayward Employs 1,000+ in Clemmons, NC
